$comment: D-CSUBSET-ANON-TYPEDECL-TYPE-FALLBACK: a file-scope anonymous enum whose enumerator is used in a file-scope const-expr (array dim) must COMPILE and RUN like the named form. Was error[H0001] (H_TypeUnresolved) on the anon enum's TypeDecl; the fix falls back to the type the analyzer stamped on the specifier node. sizeof(int[V=16]) == 64. Red-on-disable: revert lowerTypeDecl's model.typeAt(node) fallback and the compile fails H0001. One exit code across all four targets incl. the shipped release pipeline.
